prestazioni: Engine: B18C (1.8L DOHC VTEC) with a Tomei 272° duration camshaft set (intake/exhaust) paired with Supertech +1mm oversized titanium retainers and Ferrea 5000 series valves (1mm larger intake, 1mm larger exhaust) for high-RPM stability. Compression ratio increased to 12.5:1 via JE FSR forged pistons (87.5mm bore) and Eagle H-beam connecting rods with ARP 2000 rod bolts.

Forced Induction: Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by HyTech Exhaust, mated to a GReddy Type-S intercooler (core dimensions: 24x6x3.5 inches) and a Tomei M82 blow-off valve. Fuel system upgraded with a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 injectors, and a Hondata K-Pro ECU with custom 3-bar MAP sensor calibration for 350whp on E85.

Drivetrain & Handling: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) with 4.785 final drive ratio, paired with a DC Sports 80mm driveshaft and a Fidanza 12.5lb aluminum flywheel. Suspension features Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (22-way adjustable damping) with Cusco pillowball upper mounts and Whiteline 24mm adjustable sway bars (front/rear). Braking upgraded to Endless CC-R6 rotors (280mm front, 260mm rear) with AP Racing CP5556-2600 calipers and Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Body: Seibon Carbon Fiber DC2 Type R-specific widebody kit (JDM-spec fenders, front bumper lip, and rear diffuser) with a custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap. Rear wing replaced with a Voltex Type 7 (1998 JGTC-spec) in carbon fiber, mounted on Cusco aluminum wing risers.

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (JDM-spec, FIA-approved) with Takata 4-point harnesses, paired with a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel and a Defi BF Silver gauge cluster (oil pressure, water temp, boost, and AFR). Shift knob replaced with a Mugen MF10 aluminum short shifter with a 70mm throw, and the rear seats removed for a custom aluminum half-cage by AutoPower Industries.

Wheels & Stance: Work Meister S1 3P 15x9 +15 (front) and 15x10 +25 (rear) in Gunmetal, wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (225/45/15 front, 245/40/15 rear). Fender rolling by KBD Bodywerks with -2° front camber and -1.5° rear camber, achieved via Buddy Club camber plates and Hardrace adjustable rear toe arms.
